review.defaultSourceDesc: On translate: pause after recognition to edit source
review.defaultTargetDesc: On translate: pause after translation to edit target
review.defaultsFootnote: Applies to new tasks only; override per task in the subtitle editor.

transcribe.chunkDurationMossHint: MOSS ASR uses a fixed 180s chunk size; this setting is ignored.
transcribe.vocalSeparationDesc: Use in noisy backgrounds to improve transcription accuracy
transcribe.clickSoundDesc: Play a light sound effect when buttons and switches are clicked
transcribe.flatSrtOutputDesc: Additionally write subtitles directly to the output directory for batch lookup

translate.providerHint: Each provider is an independent profile. URL and model are freely editable; Reset restores that provider's preset.
translate.resetPresetTitle: Restore this provider's default URL and model (keeps the key; click Save to persist)
translate.visionAssistDesc: Best for visually-dense videos (tutorials, screen recordings); requires a vision-capable model

subtitle.autoBurnDesc: Burns subtitles into the video when a task is finalized. If translation review is enabled, burn-in waits until you confirm the translation.
subtitle.beautifyDesc: Trim leading/trailing punctuation and visual polish

models.asr06bDesc: Default: good enough accuracy, multilingual, balanced speed, smaller download.
models.asr17bDesc: Pick for higher accuracy; language coverage similar to 0.6B, larger download.
models.asrCohereDesc: Strong accuracy and faster recognition; fixed 14 languages — good for EU / mixed speech.
models.asrMossDesc: Meetings / multi-speaker. Slower end-to-end; this app always uses ~180s chunks.
models.alignDesc: Aligns recognized text to the audio timeline for subtitles (shared by all speech models).
models.alignQwenDesc: Optional. Source-language list becomes shorter (intersection with ASR, roughly a dozen).
models.alignCtcDesc: Default — smaller download; fine for typical subtitle timing. Keep this if unsure.
models.demucsDesc: Optional. Enable when background music is loud; adds an extra processing step.
